name: Idan Ravin

last_movies.title: 胜利时刻：湖人王朝崛起 第一季

introduction: Known for his unconventional training methods and unique path from religious upbringing to lawyer to training more than 100 NBA players and a dozen NBA and WNBA All-Stars. Has been featured at length in the Wall Street Journal, New York Times, New York Post, New Yorker, Sports Illustrated, Men's Health, Men's Fitness, Men's Journal, Forbes, Boston Globe, Vulture, Hollywood Reporter, among others, as well as television, including HBO and commercials for Nike, radio, and national podcasts, including On Par hosted by Maury Povich,Handpicked by Adam McKay to produce HBO's hit television series, Winning Time. Recently wrote, directed, and produced his first short film, DaddySitter, which won Best Family Film and Best First Time Director at the Berlin Kiez Film Festival. A creative consultant for commercials for Nike, Right Guard, Sprite, Samsung, Gatorade, Degree, State Farm, NBA, Wells Fargo, Budweiser, Beats, Door Dash, among others. Collaborated with brands, such as Nike, Degree, Dove Men, Acute, and HBO to build and execute experiential activations anchored in training and brand messaging.A best-selling author, having written The Hoops Whisperer, It Takes Patience, and Harmonica, an accomplished screenwriter and investor, sought-after public speaker.Holds a Master of Science, Kinesiology; Juris Doctor (law degree); Bachelor of Science, Finance; Bachelor of Science, Marketing; coursework toward a Master of Law in Taxation. .
